fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 80 incorrectly identifies cases where both input streams end with the same version, and line 81 then erroneously removes one of these required versions from the merged list.

constraints.intent: This line, which removes a correctly merged element, should be unreachable.
The total number of elements must be preserved even if the last elements are identical.
The final merged list must contain all elements from both input lists.
